title: Better to Play/Better to Play Backport (MVS/MVS Backport)
description: A MC Mod, was many new Items/Blocks/Advancements etc. in your world added!
body:
The Better to Play mod **(Actually More Vanilla Stuff (MVS))** Mod is a mod for (Neo)Forge (and Fabric) and adds a lot of new stuff in your world.

This Modification has a de_de, en_us and es_es Support (Deutsch, English and España)

**MVS Blocks/Items (1.17):**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![MVS Items (1.17)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5038a5eb069b50426768f30cf8bba1a02c4a3c74.png)

![MVS Blocks (1.17)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7fe5b3f5e965bff3884b664da13ccaddb344b59.png)

</details>

**Tools Family:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Emerald:** A thing that seen in many mods, but here with new other thinks.

**Netherald:** A new ore that stronger as Netherite and is rarer as Netherite.

**Dragon:** The Strongest item family of this modification with not so overpowered stuff and difficult to obtain.
This item family has also a new model on different items.

**Rose Gold:** Stronger then gold but weaker then iron.

</details>

**Enchantmens:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Breaking:** A Curse enchantment who tools/swords breaks faster.

**Dragon,s Breath:** Can be applied with the Ender Dragon Sword and you can shoot dragon,s breath

**Dragon Wings:** Can be applied with the Flight Staff and (for example) you can use this for your elytra.

**Elytra Wings (1.20.1 only and only until V1.15.4):** Can be applied on a Dragon Chestplate and press "RSHIFT" to use as elytra.

**Ender Touch:** The MVS version of Silk Touch to break a bit of ores in The End.

**Flipper:** When applied on a Water Orb: you gain dolphins grace

**Freeze Aspect:** Can be applied with a sword/axe and mobs with fire resistance (like blazes) takes more damage.

**Mining:** When applied on a Enchant Orb: you gain haste

**Regneration:** When applied on the Enchant Orb: you gain Regeneration

**Sculk Pacifist:** When applied on the weapon: you can reset the NBT data "anger" of the warden 

**Speedy:** When applied on the Enchant Orb: you gain speed

**Spider Eye:** When applied on the Enchant Orb: you gain Night Vision

**Tanky:** When applied on the Enchant Orb: you gain Resistance

**Useless:** A useless enchantment.

**XP Boost:** Can be applied with a sword/tool and mobs and ores drops more experience..

</details>



**Other Pictures (Advancements etc.):**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![MVS Advancements (1.17)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d30229ce2c3a86dd74a8b618fa5de0553334c0b.png)

![MVS Blocks (Ingame)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e8a11fe71c735623f058a0ee9f1df4ddd0e896_0.webp)

</details>


**Gamerules and Commands**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**/setblockhand:** Places the block in your hand below you (like /setblock ~ ~-1 ~ <Block>) (Since 1.17.1)

**/mvs <command>:** A 7 in 1 command! (Since 1.16.4)

**/gm (in 1.21.X /gamemode) <c;a;s;spec>:** A 4 in 1 command! (Since 1.16.4)

**/music <command>:** A 8 in 1 command! (Since 1.16.4)

**/modcommands:** The MVS Command List (max 1.16.3)

**/day and /night:** The Simple /time set day and /time set night

**/command:** Gives the player a command block (max 1.16.3)

**/egg:** Gives the player a dragon egg (max 1.16.3)

**/barrier:** Gives the player a barrier (max 1.16.3)

**/structure:** Gives the player a simple structure kit (max 1.16.3)

**/invisframe:** Gives the player a invisible Item Fame (max 1.16.3)

**/creative:** /gamemode creative shortcut (max 1.16.3)

**/survival:** /gamemode survival shortcut (max 1.16.3)

**/adventure:** /gamemode adventure shortcut (max 1.16.3)

**/spectator:** /gamemode spectator shortcut (max 1.16.3)

**/music_c:s:ne:uw:end:end2:menu:credits:** Minecraft music with 1 command (max 1.16.3)

**/the_end:nether:overworld:** Switches the dimension with 1 short command (V1.15+) (max 1.16.3)

**/Toggledownfall:** A from 1.12 removed command readded in this mod

**/modpotions:** A GUI with recipes for the modded potions

**/mvsminigame:** Generates a room with a short minigame (debug feature) (max 1.16.3)

**/mvsdebugtoggle, /mvsxpboosttoggle, /mvsgriefingtoggle:** Toggle the gamerules of this
modification **(Only avalible until V1.15.3/4! Since V11m25a replaced with config!)**

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**(Anti)Blockgriefing:** Disabelds block griefing (like TNT, Pistons and modded thinks)

**DebugFeatures:** Enables the debug features of this mod (like /mvsminigame and other)

**XpBoostPlus:** Enables more XP drops (with the XP Boost enchantment) for every living entity to support other mods!

**(Only avalible until V1.15.3/4! Now replaced with config!)**

</details>
